languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn raises a finger, appearing delighted.{/n} "Ah, so I was the subject of your experiment! A most infrequent occurrence, indeed. I hope you are satisfied with the result."

languages.text: {n}Эоганн восторженно вздымает палец.{/n} "А, так значит я стал объектом вашего эксперимента! Весьма редкое событие, весьма. Надеюсь, что результат вас удовлетворил".
{n}Eogunn raises a finger, appearing delighted.{/n} "Ah, so I was the subject of your experiment! A most infrequent occurrence, indeed. I hope you are satisfied with the result."

{n}Eogunn raises a finger, appearing delighted.{/n} "Ah, so I was the subject of your experiment! A most infrequent occurrence, indeed. I hope you are satisfied with the result."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn levanta un dedo con deleite.{/n} «¡Ah, conque era el sujeto de su experimento! Un evento extremadamente poco frecuente, sin duda. Espero que esté satisfech{mf|o|a} con el resultado».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn raises a finger, appearing delighted.{/n} "Ah, so I was the subject of your experiment! A most infrequent occurrence, indeed. I hope you are satisfied with the result."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn levanta un dedo con deleite.{/n} «¡Ah, conque era el sujeto de su experimento! Un evento extremadamente poco frecuente, sin duda. Espero que esté satisfech{mf|o|a} con el resultado».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡伸出一根手指，看起来很兴奋。{/n}“啊，原来我才是您的实验对象！这可真是难得的经历。希望结果能让您满意。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn raises a finger, appearing delighted.{/n} "Ah, so I was the subject of your experiment! A most infrequent occurrence, indeed. I hope you are satisfied with the result."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡伸出一根手指，看起来很兴奋。{/n}“啊，原来我才是您的实验对象！这可真是难得的经历。希望结果能让您满意。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn lève un doigt, visiblement ravi.{/n} « Ah, j'étais donc le cobaye de votre expérience ! Voilà qui m'arrive rarement, je l'avoue. J'espère que le résultat vous satisfait. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn raises a finger, appearing delighted.{/n} "Ah, so I was the subject of your experiment! A most infrequent occurrence, indeed. I hope you are satisfied with the result."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn lève un doigt, visiblement ravi.{/n} « Ah, j'étais donc le cobaye de votre expérience ! Voilà qui m'arrive rarement, je l'avoue. J'espère que le résultat vous satisfait. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn hebt einen Finger und wirkt erfreut.{/n} "Ah, ich war also das Subjekt Eurer Experiments! Das ist in der Tat eine Seltenheit. Ich hoffe, Ihr seid mit dem Ergebnis zufrieden."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn raises a finger, appearing delighted.{/n} "Ah, so I was the subject of your experiment! A most infrequent occurrence, indeed. I hope you are satisfied with the result."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn hebt einen Finger und wirkt erfreut.{/n} "Ah, ich war also das Subjekt Eurer Experiments! Das ist in der Tat eine Seltenheit. Ich hoffe, Ihr seid mit dem Ergebnis zufrieden."

languages.text: {n}エオガンは指を立て、嬉しそうだ。{/n}「ああ、私はあなたの実験の被験者だったのか！実にめったにないことだ。結果にご満足いただけたでしょうか？」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn raises a finger, appearing delighted.{/n} "Ah, so I was the subject of your experiment! A most infrequent occurrence, indeed. I hope you are satisfied with the result."

traits.locale_text: {n}エオガンは指を立て、嬉しそうだ。{/n}「ああ、私はあなたの実験の被験者だったのか！実にめったにないことだ。結果にご満足いただけたでしょうか？」

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, keyiflenmiş bir hâlde parmağını kaldırıyor.{/n} "Yani deneyinizin konusu bendim! Gerçekten de çok nadir görülen bir durum. Umarım sonuçtan memnun kalmışsınızdır."
